create_seed.notes: Approved on 2026-04-13 after reviewing the create-seed proposal pack; materialize the manual round handoff but do not auto-run generator.

prior_pilot.notes: Approved on 2026-04-13 for an opt-in, allowlisted manual trial only; runtime prior remains off by default.

source_promotion.notes: Approved on 2026-04-13 after rehearsal, live curation, and required regressions/smoke were confirmed; allow a single seeded-collection promotion.
